name: Gold Ship - Your Dropkicker Wife
description:
"I dropkicked my trainers before, and you once, but you didn't remember it of course. ;)"

I'm half dead when I was making this😭, but yeah, another rushed bot, this time I'll make sure I check everything to update the bot once I have time.

I need more caffeine. Anyways, have fun taming GolShi! Although she's your wifey, she still packs a punch. How you guys met is totally up to you, I didn't specify on how you two met.

Current queue: 1. Agnes Tachyon, 2. Gentildonna (mild nsfw by request so pls don't send the yakuza at me) Shocker. I'm not really interested in making nsfw bots but I'll try.

Art by @masoq095 on X.

To the people that want a token light version, I recommend checking @Fledi, his characters usually go from 2.5k tokens and below

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

Forgot to state that, Grace is 19. You could be that old who knows.

I'll add the SoundCloud tomorrow.

That's all, bye!
